revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:恵比須神社 (那覇市)]]
{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ebisu Shrine |image = File:Ebisu Jinja (Naha).JPG |location = [[:en:Naha, Okinawa|那覇市]], Aja 251, Okinawa Prefecture, Japan |latitude = 26 |lat_minutes = 14 |lat_seconds = 23.3 |N/S = N |longitude = 127 |lon_minutes = 41 |lon_seconds = 8.6 |E/W = E |map_code = JP |map = Japan Naha city |deity = {{ill|Amaterasu|en|Amaterasu|qid=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu}} |founded = Unknown |head_priest = |main_hall = |other_names = |shrine_type = |main_festival = |rites = |location = {{ill|Naha|qid=Q181966|1=Naha}} |coordinates = {{Coord|26.239805555555556|N|127.68572222222222|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} }} '''Ebisu Shrine''' (恵比須神社, ''Ebisu Jinja'') is a '''Shinto shrine''' located in '''Aja, Naha City, Okinawa Prefecture'''. Despite its name, '''Ebisu Shrine''', the enshrined deity is actually '''Amaterasu-Ōmikami''', not Ebisu. == History == The shrine was '''founded by a former head priest of {{ill|Oki-no-gū‎|ja|沖宮|1=Oki-no-gū‎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oki-no-gū‎|13=User:Immanuelle/Oki-no-gū‎|qq=}}''', one of the '''Ryukyu Hachisha''' (琉球八社, the eight major shrines of the Ryukyu Kingdom). It is known that '''beneath the shrine, there is a cave''', and the area '''was once a site of executions''' during the Ryukyu Kingdom era. Notably, '''Heshikiya Chōbin''' (平敷屋朝敏) and others were executed here. Ebisu Shrine '''is not affiliated with the [[Association of Shinto Shrines]] (神社本庁, Association of Shinto Shrines)'''.
== See Also == * {{ill|Oki-no-gū‎|ja|沖宮|1=Oki-no-gū‎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oki-no-gū‎|13=User:Immanuelle/Oki-no-gū‎|qq=}} (沖宮) – One of the '''{{ill|Eight Ryukyu Shrines|ja|琉球八社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Ryukyu Shrines|qq=}}''' * [[Shinto shrines in Okinawa Prefecture]] == References == {{Reflist|qq=}} {{Shinto-horizontal|qq=}}
{{Shinto-stub|qq=}} {{Okinawan Shrines|qq=}}
{{translated page|ja|恵比須神社 (那覇市)|version=96289794|comment=Imported full ja history}}
